name: The Michinoku Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Michinoku Bank, Ltd. provides various banking products and services in Japan. The company accepts savings, time, and foreign currency deposits. Its loan portfolio comprises housing, remodeling, mortgage, card, car, education, multipurpose, and business loans. The company also offers various cards; investment trust, mutual fund, and government bonds; insurance and pension products; and Internet and mobile banking. It operates through a network of 92 branches, 2 offices, and 1 representative office. The Michinoku Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Aomori, Japan.
